message:
feat(FJ-P2C-008-G): E2E scenario scripts for LAX primitive first wave

10 E2E scenarios: all-primitives-scalar (20+ ops), all-primitives-tensor
rank1/rank2, composition (add-mul-reduce, exp-log roundtrip,
reshape-transpose-reshape), edge cases (NaN propagation, Inf arithmetic,
NaN comparison semantics), error paths (arity/shape/unsupported),
broadcasting pipeline (scalar+vector, comparison broadcast).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
